title: Five AFP Symbols — Daily Protocol
baseLayerNote: 🌪️ Tornado of Momentum is now a Base Layer primitive alongside 🔗 Chain of Synchronisation and 🧬 Helix of Adaptability

symbols.name: Anchor of Stability
symbols.aspect: Stability amid inner ripples + external disturbances
symbols.task: When the first ripple hits (family tension, online argument), place one hand on chest or a physical anchor object. Repeat: "I am the anchor. The disturbance is weather. My goal does not move." Name one micro-precaution for the next 30 minutes. Run once daily even on calm days.

symbols.name: Fire of Conviction
symbols.aspect: Trust in myself and the process
symbols.task: Open AFP journal to Past Victories Log. Read one specific past success aloud. Write: "Today I trust the process because yesterday I [specific action]." Light a match or candle for 10 seconds — carry the warmth into the day.

symbols.name: Sprout of Nurturing
symbols.aspect: Purity in mind, body, and soul — fuel for faith
symbols.task: Rotate daily: Mind — 10 min pure silence; Body — one clean choice (water, push-ups, sunlight); Soul — one precept affirmation in journal. Protect this block as sacred.

symbols.name: Tornado of Momentum
symbols.aspect: Energy and self-perpetuation on easy repetitive work
symbols.task: Stack easy repetitive tasks. Set 5-minute timer — full speed, no perfectionism. After: journal "Tornado completed X items in Y minutes — momentum is real." One sprint per day.

symbols.name: Engine of Efficiency
symbols.aspect: Breakthrough of limits + continuous process improvement
symbols.task: When you find an elegant solution: write old vs new method, draw engine upgrade icon, ask "What tweak makes this faster next time?" Keep dedicated Engine Notebook. Review last 7 upgrades every Sunday.

cycle: Anchor keeps the system on course → Fire supplies belief → Sprout provides clean fuel → Tornado multiplies energy → Engine converts power into measurable progress.

formulas.name: Conviction + Wings of Ambition + Anchor → Tornado
